description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines build_and_deploy and test jobs for many Linux distributions (almalinux 8,9,10; amazonlinux 2,2023; debian 11,12,13; opensuse 15.6; ubuntu 20.04,22.04,24.04) and their arm64 and fips variants, each job extending the appropriate shared template (.build_and_deploy_with_ruby_amd64, .build_and_deploy_arm64, .build_and_deploy_amd64, .test_build_with_ruby_amd64, .test_build_arm64, .test_build_amd64). The build jobs run in the build stage, execute the commands defined in their templates to compile the project (e.g., bundle install, make, docker build) and push the resulting images or packages to the GitLab Container Registry; the test jobs run in the test stage, execute the test commands from their templates (e.g., bundle exec rspec, make test) and publish JUnit reports as artifacts. Include Raspberry Pi specific jobs (rpi_11, rpi_12) that depend on separate dependency‑build jobs (rpi_11_cmake, rpi_11_git, rpi_12_cmake, rpi_12_git) using the .dep_build_armv7 and .test_dep_build_armv7 templates, with proper needs relationships. Apply .dev-tag-only to sles_12sp5 build job and .dev-branch-only to its test job, and restrict those jobs to development tags/branches. Import the shared template file /.gitlab/ci/templates.gitlab-ci.yml, rely on the default Docker image defined in the templates (typically a ruby image), and do not declare extra services.
